posts.author: azelenkin0306 (Alexey Zelenkin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I get the “Recipe Creation failed” when trying to create the following recipe:

image784×1174 87.7 KB

If remove the part

and {column,columnRejected} to {value, valueRejected} if Not

recipe is created successfully.

Are there any limitations for recipe text length?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @azelenkin0306

Looks like you hit the limit of 256 (?) characters for either the trigger or the action. The 256 might be a little different, it is what I remember. Tip: also the fieldnames (like columnAccepted) is counted, so if you change it to CA you win a few characters. Not nice, but in my situation is saved just enough to create my recipe.

posts.author: azelenkin0306 (Alexey Zelenkin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, @basdebruin
Yes, you were right. Shortened the recipe and now everything is fine

Thanks a lot.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
